# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: vpc-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL
    description: VPC network for three-tier application
- name: app-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.10.0/24
    description: Application tier subnet
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
- name: web-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.20.0/24
    description: Web tier subnet
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
- name: db-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.30.0/24
    description: Database tier subnet
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
- name: default-allow-internal
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges: [ "10.0.0.0/8" ]
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports: [ "0-65535" ]
    - IPProtocol: udp
      ports: [ "0-65535" ]
    - IPProtocol: icmp
    description: Allow internal traffic
- name: default-allow-external
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges: [ "0.0.0.0/0" ]
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports: [ "22" ]
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports: [ "80" ]
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports: [ "443" ]
    - IPProtocol: udp
      ports: [ "53" ]
    description: Allow external traffic
- name: default-deny-all
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges: [ "0.0.0.0/0" ]
    denied:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
    - IPProtocol: udp
    - IPProtocol: icmp
    description: Deny all traffic
    priority: 65535
    direction: INGRESS
- name: app-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges: [ "10.0.10.0/24" ]
    targetTags: [ "app-tier" ]
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports: [ "8080" ]
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports: [ "8443" ]
    description: Allow traffic to application tier
- name: web-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges: [ "10.0.20.0/24" ]
    targetTags: [ "web-tier" ]
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports: [ "80" ]
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports: [ "443" ]
    description: Allow traffic to web tier
- name: db-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges: [ "10.0.30.0/24" ]
    targetTags: [ "db-tier" ]
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports: [ "3306" ]
    description: Allow traffic to database tier
